description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a well-maintained yard with several mature trees and a small pond. The structure features a complex, multi-faceted roof with intersecting gables and a combination of light and dark roofing materials. The main entrance is set back from the street, accessible via a short walkway, and is flanked by a modest porch area. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is bordered by a low hedge and includes a driveway that connects to the adjacent road. The backyard features a small pool or pond, enhancing the outdoor living space.
description: A single-story bungalow with a multi-gabled roof, surrounded by trees, a pond, and a driveway, featuring large windows and a modest porch.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, driveway, and several trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the pond, dense tree coverage, and the rear of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the backyard, pond, and the side of the house with additional windows.
description_view_3: Direct front view with a clear look at the entrance, porch, and the driveway leading up to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
